summary: Summary: The conversation begins with Speaker1 (Sarah) confronting an invited visitor with frustration and anger, accusing the person of ulterior motives and questioning the logic of the visit. Speaker2 (Kate) initially tries to calm Sarah but quickly shows frustration that escalates into anger as she questions motives and timing. The topic then shifts to Joe’s memorial and a missing boy; Speaker1 (Sarah) becomes consumed by anger, sadness, and frustration, lashes out, and even threatens self-harm to force belief, while recounting the tragic details. Speaker2 (Kate) repeatedly intervenes, dominated by frustration as she tries to calm and reason with Sarah, but moves toward anger and disbelief. By the end Sarah presses for others to trust her partner with sadness and anger, and Kate remains frustrated and angry, leaving the exchange tense and unresolved.
